Shaping stories that demand to be felt — bringing empathy, creativity, and emotional truth to every cut.

Watch My Reel About Me

About

Cutting stories that demand to be felt.

Los Angeles-based narrative film editor with a decade of experience shaping stories across features, documentaries, and episodic series. Versed in a wide range of workflows, I collaborate closely with directors and producers from assembly through picture lock — bringing a unique creative voice and a deep commitment to emotional truth in every project. I believe great editing is an act of empathy: listening to the story, honoring the performances, and finding the rhythm that makes an audience truly feel.

Work / Assistant Editing

Assistant Editing

Hands-on post-production assistance across all stages of the edit — from ingesting and organization through cutting, finishing, and delivery — across documentaries, docu-dramas, feature films, reality series, and web series for National Geographic, Discovery, History, Amazon, and more. Click any image to view on IMDb.
